title: T.J. Hawkins, Craig E. Lear, Cooper Road USA Expressway
doc_html:
NOTE: §1844 eff. upon completion of specified portion of Interstate 49 pursuant to Acts 2017, No. 157, §2.

§1844. T.J. Hawkins, Craig E. Lear, Cooper Road USA Expressway

            Notwithstanding any other law to the contrary, that portion of Interstate 49 from its intersection with Interstate 220 to its intersection with Louisiana Highway 1 in the city of Shreveport, Louisiana, shall be known and designated as the "T.J. Hawkins, Craig E. Lear, Cooper Road USA Expressway".

            Acts 2017, No. 157, §1.
